meta.title: Fernanda Haese | Designer & Front-End Developer
meta.description: Portfolio of Fernanda Haese — Digital Designer and Front-End Developer creating clean, accessible interfaces.

hero.name: Fernanda
hero.description: I craft digital experiences that pair thoughtful design with solid front-end engineering, focused on clarity, accessibility and delight.

about.title: About Me
about.description: I am a Digital Designer with experience in UX/UI Design and Front-End development. I work on creating digital solutions from information research and structuring to interface design and implementation, combining visual design, user experience, and technologies such as React, JavaScript, HTML, and CSS.

services.title: My Services
services.description: From research and interface design to front-end implementation — I help teams ship products that feel effortless to use.

uxui.title: UX/UI Design
uxui.description: Research, wireframes, prototypes and polished interfaces backed by a scalable design system.

webDesign.title: Web Design
webDesign.description: Editorial, brand-forward web pages that stay responsive, fast and accessible across devices.

frontend.title: Front-End Development
frontend.description: Componentized front-ends in React and TypeScript, with careful attention to detail and performance.

contact.title: Get in Touch!
contact.description: Have a project in mind or just want to say hi? Send a message and I'll get back to you shortly.
